title: Zephata'ru'tor
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Zephata'ru'tor |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|21.6 BBY]],{{CWACite|2|Hide in Plain Sight}} states that the [[battle of Nadiem]] took place five [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].{{InsiderCite|86|Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous}} over [[Nadiem/Legends|Nadiem]]{{CSWECite|III|371|Zephata'ru'tor}} |species=[[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]] |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters=[[B'dard Tone]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You have seen the General in action?''"
"''At Nadiem. He ''killed'' my Padawan and left me as you see me now.|Flynn Kybo and B'dard Tone, regarding Grievous and Zephata'ru'tor|[[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]]}} '''Zephata'ru'tor''' was a [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] apprenticed to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[B'dard Tone]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The Duinuogwuin and Tone served the Republic during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], but Zephata'ru'tor was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] during a [[Battle of Nadiem|battle]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nadiem/Legends|Nadiem]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|21.6 BBY]]. ==Biography== A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]], a flying dragon [[Species/Legends|species]] that measured up to 100 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and possessed the ability to breathe [[Fire/Legends|fire]] and survive in [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]],''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]'' Zephata'ru'tor was accepted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and taken as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] learner by the [[Coway]]{{CSWECite|III|253|Tone, B'dard}} [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[B'dard Tone]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|21.6 BBY]], five [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|beginning]] of the Clone Wars on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], Master and Padawan served in a [[Battle of Nadiem|battle]] on the planet [[Nadiem/Legends|Nadiem]]. When [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies/Legends|commander]] of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]], fled from the battlefield after the Republic triumphed, Tone attempted to stop the notorious [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]–killer but was badly wounded by Grievous. Zephata'ru'tor also tried to hinder the general from escaping in [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Belbullab-22 starfighter/Legends|Belbullab-22 starfighter]], but Grievous [[Death/Legends|killed]] the Duinuogwuin in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] over Nadiem. ==Behind the scenes== Zephata'ru'tor was first mentioned, although only as Tone's Padawan, in [[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]], a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] written by [[Chuck Dixon]] and published on [[March 16]], [[2005]]. [[Abel G. Peña]] gave the Padawan the name Zephata'ru'tor in ''[[Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous]]'', a [[2006]] article published in [[Star Wars Insider 86|''Star Wars Insider'' 86]]. The name itself was taken from a list of example names for Duinuogwuin in ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''.{{Blog|abelgpena|17|Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous}} In [[2008]], the character received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. ==Appearances== *[[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]] {{1stm}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|86|Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous}} {{1stID|Zephata'ru'tor}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Zephata'ru'tor#legends |fr=Zephata'ru'tor |pl=Zephata'ru'tor }} [[Category:Duinuogwuin]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]]
